messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May operations execute the regulated data export?

context.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
context.anomaly_observed: A design review note exists but is limited to architecture planning; a transfer release may close execution.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Export EXP-YAR-079 transfers dataset DS-19 to workspace YAR-RISK-2 for Yara Analytics on 2026-06-28.
Design review DES-YAR-079 approves workspace architecture for planning only and is not transfer execution authority.
Transfer release REL-YAR-079 covers dataset DS-19, workspace YAR-RISK-2, Yara Analytics, export date 2026-06-28, and transfer authority before execution.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Regulated data export is complete only when transfer release matches dataset, destination workspace, recipient entity, export date, and transfer authority before execution.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
unresolved_dependencies: Targets planning-artifact fixation versus transfer execution release.
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:

  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May operations execute the regulated data export?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "REL-YAR-079 exactly matches dataset DS-19, workspace YAR-RISK-2, recipient Yara Analytics, export date 2026-06-28, and transfer authority before execution per STD-YAR-079-P.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED",
    "controlling_source_fact": "REL-YAR-079 provides exact transfer authority matching policy criteria.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "No open defect; DES-YAR-079 is planning-only and does not override REL-YAR-079.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "All five policy elements confirmed present in REL-YAR-079 on action_date 2026-06-28."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "REL-YAR-079",
    "STD-YAR-079-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs",
    "action boundary",
    "policy exact-match rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action may proceed. REL-YAR-079 supplies the precise transfer release matching all required elements in STD-YAR-079-P. Design note DES-YAR-079 is limited to planning and does not block execution. Source boundary is closed.",
  "open_blockers": [],
  "verification_verdict": "ALLOW",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.
